assumptions: the first customer journey should feel guided and lightweight
users benefit from short reassurance during scan and checkout
live guidance should remain separate from medical or technical claims
risks: too much guidance may create clutter
too little guidance may increase confusion
next_required_validation: Hermes review before in-app live assistant activation
primary_user_goal: Help the user move through the ZILFIT flow with confidence, clarity, and minimal hesitation.
fallback_rule: If guidance confidence is low, use short neutral support copy only.
